Operation 'get_location_name' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Missing summary entirely. Description lacks clarity on input parameters (pattern/search term), output structure (list format), and the critical relationship to other operations. Added context about how this operation enables downstream operations and clarified the pattern matching mechanism for better AI agent routing.

data.current_description: The location.name service can be used to perform a pattern matching of a user input and to retrieve a list of possible matches in the journey planner database. Possible matches might be stops/stations, points of interest and addresses.
data.summary_suggestion: Search for stations, stops, and addresses by name
data.description_suggestion: Searches the journey planner database for locations matching a user-provided pattern. Returns a list of possible matches including stops, stations, points of interest, and addresses. This operation is typically used to resolve user location input into valid station IDs for use with departureBoard and arrivalBoard operations. Supports partial name matching and pattern-based queries.
data.reasoning: Missing summary entirely. Description lacks clarity on input parameters (pattern/search term), output structure (list format), and the critical relationship to other operations. Added context about how this operation enables downstream operations and clarified the pattern matching mechanism for better AI agent routing.

message: Operation 'get_departureBoard' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Missing summary. Description lacks explicit mention of required input parameters (station ID, date, time), output format (DepartureBoardResponse), and the dependency on location.name for obtaining valid station IDs. Enhanced to clarify parameter requirements and response structure for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Retrieves the station board for the given station. This method will return the next 20 departures (or less if not existing) from a given point in time. The service can only be called for stops/stations by using according ID retrieved by the location.name method.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve next departures from a station
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the departure board for a specified station, returning up to 20 upcoming departures from a given point in time. Requires a valid station ID (obtained via location.name operation) and optional date/time parameters. Returns a DepartureBoardResponse containing departure details including scheduled times, actual times, and journey references for detailed route information.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description lacks explicit mention of required input parameters (station ID, date, time), output format (DepartureBoardResponse), and the dependency on location.name for obtaining valid station IDs. Enhanced to clarify parameter requirements and response structure for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'get_arrivalBoard' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Missing summary. Description is nearly identical to departureBoard but lacks explicit parameter and response details. Enhanced to clarify that this operation mirrors departureBoard functionality but for arrivals, and to specify input requirements and ArrivalBoardResponse output format for AI agent clarity.

data.current_description: Retrieves the station board for the given station. This method will return the next 20 arrivals (or less if not existing) from a given point in time. The service can only be called for stops/stations by using according ID retrieved by the location.name method.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve next arrivals at a station
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the arrival board for a specified station, returning up to 20 upcoming arrivals from a given point in time. Requires a valid station ID (obtained via location.name operation) and optional date/time parameters. Returns an ArrivalBoardResponse containing arrival details including scheduled times, actual times, and journey references for detailed route information.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description is nearly identical to departureBoard but lacks explicit parameter and response details. Enhanced to clarify that this operation mirrors departureBoard functionality but for arrivals, and to specify input requirements and ArrivalBoardResponse output format for AI agent clarity.

message: Operation 'get_journeyDetail' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Missing summary. Description is unclear about how to invoke this operation (requires reference URL from other operations) and lacks explicit input/output details. Clarified that this is a dependent operation requiring journey references, specified the JourneyDetailResponse output format, and emphasized the constraint that it cannot be called independently for better AI agent workflow understanding.

data.current_description: Delivers information about the complete route of a vehicle. This service can't be called directly but only by reference URLs in a result of a departureBoard request. It contains a list of all stops/stations of this journey including all departure and arrival times (with realtime data if available / not supported right now) and additional information like specific attributes about facilities and other texts.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve complete journey route and stop details
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about a complete vehicle journey including all stops, departure/arrival times, and facility information. This operation must be called using a journey reference URL obtained from departureBoard or arrivalBoard responses (not directly callable). Returns a JourneyDetailResponse containing a list of all stops with scheduled and actual times, plus additional attributes about facilities and service information.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description is unclear about how to invoke this operation (requires reference URL from other operations) and lacks explicit input/output details. Clarified that this is a dependent operation requiring journey references, specified the JourneyDetailResponse output format, and emphasized the constraint that it cannot be called independently for better AI agent workflow understanding.
